---
title: Draft code and doc
---

# Let's get location

```r
#| load-pkg
library(pkgfilecache)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(devtools)

# optional
library(tibble)
```

```r
#| load-pkg
load_all()
document()
test()
build_vignettes()
check(vignettes = FALSE)
```

```r
#| id: proto-function
list_optional_files()

raw_op <- get_raw_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_objective <- get_ref_objective_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_protocol <- get_ref_protocol_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
op_objective <- get_objective_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
sampling_point <- get_sampling_point_aspe() |> as_tibble()
op_description <- get_description_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
op_env_raw <- get_environmental_data_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_isolation <- get_ref_isolation_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
raw_ref_species <- get_species_aspe() |> as_tibble()

detail_sampling <- get_elementary_sampling_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_detail_sampling <- get_ref_elementary_sampling_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_prospection <- get_ref_prospection_method_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_passage <- get_ref_passage_aspe() |> as_tibble()

point_group <- get_point_group_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_point_group <- get_ref_point_group_aspe() |> as_tibble()

species <- cleaning_species_ref_aspe() |> as_tibble()

ref_batch_type <- get_ref_type_batch_aspe() |> as_tibble()
raw_fish_batch <- get_fish_batch_aspe() |> as_tibble()
raw_individual_measurement <- get_individual_measurement_aspe() |> as_tibble()
raw_ref_length <- get_ref_type_length_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_length <- cleaning_ref_length_type_aspe() |> as_tibble()
```

```{r}
raw_station <- get_raw_station_aspe() |> as_tibble()

load_all()
station <- clean_station_aspe(
  station = get_raw_station_aspe(),
  ref_coordinates = get_raw_ref_coordinates_station_aspe(),
  crs_to = 4326
  ) |>
  as_tibble()

library(sf)
station_hubeau_poisson_raw <- readr::read_csv2(
  "~/Documents/work/riversea/data/river/station_HUBEAU_poisson.csv"
) |>
  mutate(across(contains("epsg"), as.integer))
station_hubeau_poisson_raw
colnames(station_hubeau_poisson_raw)
station_hubeau_poisson_coord_station <-  station_hubeau_poisson_raw |>
  st_as_sf(
    coords = c("coordonnee_x_station", "coordonnee_y_station"),
    # LAMBERT 93: 2154
    crs = unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_epsg_projection_station)
  )
station_hubeau_poisson_coord_pt_prevelement <- station_hubeau_poisson_raw |>
  st_as_sf(
    coords = c("coordonnee_x_point_prelevement", "coordonnee_y_point_prelevement"),
    # LAMBERT 93: 2154
    crs = unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_epsg_projection_point_prelevement)
  )
station <- clean_station_aspe(
  station = get_raw_station_aspe(),
  ref_coordinates = get_raw_ref_coordinates_station_aspe(),
  crs_to = unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_epsg_projection_station)
  ) |>
  as_tibble()
station_aspe <- station |>
  filter(site_id %in% unique(filtered_sampling$operation$site_id)) |>
  st_as_sf(
    coords = c("x", "y"),
    crs = unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_epsg_projection_station)
  )

station_hubeau_poisson |>
  filter(!code_station %in% station_aspe$sandre_code)
station_aspe |>
  filter(!sandre_code %in% station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_station)

library(mapview)
mapview::mapview(list(
  station_hubeau_poisson_coord_pt_prevelement,
  station_hubeau_poisson_coord_station,
  station_aspe), col.regions = c("green", "black", "blue"))

plot(st_geometry(station_hubeau_poisson_coord_pt_prevelement))
points(st_geometry(station_aspe))

fishing_operation = filtered_sampling$operation
save(
  station_aspe, fishing_operation,
  file = here::here("station_operation_filtered_aspe_ismael.rda")
)

sampling_point_hubeau_poisson <- sampling_point |> 
  filter(pop_id %in% unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_point_prelevement_aspe))
# Check that raw op have all the code_point_prelevement_aspe:
ele_sampling <- cleaning_elementary_sampling()  |> as_tibble()
raw_op |>
  filter(ope_pop_id %in% unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_point_prelevement_aspe))

ele_sampling |>
  filter(prelevement_id %in% unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_point_prelevement_aspe))

station_aspe %>%
  filter(!site_id %in% unique(sampling_point_hubeau_poisson$pop_sta_id))

station_operation_filtered_aspe_ismael$fishing_operation |>
  filter(operation_id %in% unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_point_prelevement_aspe))
colnames(sampling_point)
colnames(sampling_point)
station_hubeau_poisson_raw |> 
  select(code_point_prelevement_aspe)

## Keep the sandre code
## Add hydrographic_basin (aspe_)
read_raw_data(file_name = "ref_bassin.csv")
#op_env_raw
```

```{r}
remotes::install_github("inrae/hubeau")
library(mapview)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(hubeau)
station_hubeau_poisson_raw <- hubeau::get_poisson_stations()
# station_hubeau_poisson_raw <- readr::read_csv2(
#   "~/Documents/work/riversea/data/river/station_HUBEAU_poisson.csv"
# ) |>
#   mutate(across(contains("epsg"), as.integer))
station_hubeau_poisson_raw
colnames(station_hubeau_poisson_raw)

load(file = here::here("station_operation_filtered_aspe_ismael.rda"))
station_aspe
fishing_operation

## Make spatial object with either station coord or prelevement one
station_hubeau_poisson_coord_station <- station_hubeau_poisson_raw |>
  filter(!(is.na(coordonnee_x_station) | is.na(coordonnee_y_station)))
station_hubeau_poisson_coord_station <- station_hubeau_poisson_coord_station |>
  st_as_sf(
    coords = c("coordonnee_x_station", "coordonnee_y_station"),
    # LAMBERT 93: 2154
    crs = unique(station_hubeau_poisson_coord_station$code_epsg_projection_station)
  )
station_hubeau_poisson_coord_pt_prevelement <- station_hubeau_poisson_raw |>
  st_as_sf(
    coords = c("coordonnee_x_point_prelevement", "coordonnee_y_point_prelevement"),
    # LAMBERT 93: 2154
    crs = unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_epsg_projection_point_prelevement)
  )

station_aspe_in_hubeau_sandre <- station_aspe |>
  filter(sandre_code %in% unique(station_hubeau_poisson_raw$code_station))

mapview::mapview(list(
  station_hubeau_poisson_coord_station,
  station_aspe,
  station_aspe_in_hubeau_sandre
),
  col.regions = c("black", "blue", "green"))

```

```{r}
station_operation_filtered_aspe_ismael

```





```{r}
op_description <- clean_description_operation_aspe(
  op_description = get_description_operation_aspe(),
  ref_isolation = get_ref_isolation_operation_aspe(),
  ref_prospection = get_ref_prospection_method_operation_aspe()
  ) |>
  as_tibble()
```


```r
op <- clean_operation_aspe() %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  filter(
    protocol %in% c("complete", "partial_by_point", "partial_over_bank")
  )

ele_sampling <- cleaning_elementary_sampling() |> as_tibble()
point_group <- cleaning_point_group()
```

```r
fish_batch <- clean_fish_batch(fish_batch = raw_fish_batch)
ind_measure <- clean_individual_measurement_aspe(
  ind_measure = raw_individual_measurement
)
```

## Filter samplings based on sensible default

```{r}
#| id: filter-op
filtered_sampling <- filter_operation_batch_measure(
  operation = op,
  op_protocol_to_keep = c("complete", "partial_by_point",  "partial_over_bank"),
  op_objective_to_exclude = vec_op_objective_to_exclude(),
  oldest_sampling_date = "1995-01-01",
  omit_na_site = TRUE,
  point_group = point_group,
  min_prop_point_group_on_bank = .999,
  ele_sampling = ele_sampling,
  max_passage_number = 1,
  fish_batch = fish_batch,
  ind_measure = ind_measure
)
unique(filtered_sampling$operation$site_id)
```

## Sanitize species code and check there are alright

```r
# Sanitize
## TODO: adding fishbase validated names in cleaning_species_ref_aspe()
filtered_sampling[c("fish_batch", "ind_measure")] <-
  filtered_sampling[c("fish_batch", "ind_measure")] |>
    purrr::map(\(x) sanitize_species_code(data = x))
summary(as.factor(filtered_sampling$fish_batch$length_type))
# Check
# TODO: check on validated names, i.e. output different than entry
filtered_sampling[c("fish_batch", "ind_measure")] |>
  purrr::map(\(x) check_aspe_fish_species(species = x$species_code)
)
# Return Salmo trutta because it is ambiguous between brown (river) trout and sea trout but there are the same species and they work with fish base.
```

## Check maximum length

```{r}
#| id: length-conversion
species_fork_length <- filtered_sampling$fish_batch |>
    filter(length_type == "fork") |>
    distinct(species_code) |>
    left_join(species,
      by = join_by(species_code)
    )
ll <- rfishbase::length_length(species_list = species_fork_length$latin_name)

sanitized_length_type <- convert_fork_to_total(
  fish_batch = filtered_sampling$fish_batch,
  ind_measure = filtered_sampling$ind_measure,
  species_ref = cleaning_species_ref_aspe(),
  fishbase_length_length = ll,
  conversion_vector = coefficients_fork2total(),
  convert_intercept_cm2mm = TRUE,
  manual_priority = FALSE,
  verbose = TRUE
)
sanitized_length <- remove_impossible_lengths(
  ind_measure = sanitized_length_type$ind_measure,
  fish_batch = sanitized_length_type$fish_batch,
  species_ref = species,
  remove_outliers = TRUE
)
sanitized_length$outlier_summary |>
  arrange(desc(n_outliers))
sanitized_length$outliers |>
  filter(species_code == "HOT") |>
  select(-c(operation_id:measure_id)) |>
  arrange(desc(size)) |>
  print(n = 200)
```

```{r}
sanitized <- sanitize_batch_data(
  fish_batch = sanitized_length$fish_batch,
  ind_measure = sanitized_length$ind_measure,
  species_ref = species,
  min_individuals_G = 2,
  min_individuals_SL = 6
)

```

```{r}
sanitized$filtering_log
sanitized$validation_issues
sanitized$fish_batch |>
  filter(min_length == max_length) |>
  select(batch_type, min_length, max_length, number)
sanitized$fish_batch |>
  filter(batch_type == "G") |>
  filter(is.na(min_length) | is.na(max_length))
```

## Generate fish size from batch

```{r}
fish_individual_size <- generate_individual_sizes(sanitized, verbose = TRUE)

fish_individual_size |>
  filter(species_code == "CHP")
readr::write_csv(
  x = fish_individual_size,
  file = here::here("data-raw", "fish_individual_size.csv")
)

fish <- readr::read_csv(
  here::here("data-raw", "fish_individual_size.csv")
)
```

## length-weight conversion

```{r}

species <- cleaning_species_ref_aspe()
fish_individual_size <- readr::read_csv(
  file = here::here("data-raw", "fish_individual_size.csv"),
  col_types = "ici"
)

result <- convert_length_to_weight(
  fish_data = fish_individual_size,
  species_ref = species,
  verbose = TRUE
 )

```

##  Covariate tables

```{r}
station
```
